name: degoog-toolkit
description: SearXNG integrations, plugins, and themes for degoog.
author: SoPat712

themes.name: LiterallyGoogle
themes.description:
A Google-like theme with a sticky header and full-width above-results plugin slots.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

themes.name: LiterallyApple
themes.description:
Apple-inspired liquid glass theme with translucent materials, capsule search, and full-width plugin slots.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description:
Current weather with interactive charts (temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity), a 7-day forecast and configurable units (imperial by default — Fahrenheit, mph, mmHg, inch). Supports !weather <city>, leading phrases like 'weather in rome', and trailing-keyword queries like 'rome weather' or 'london forecast today'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Calculator
plugins.description:
Google-style scientific calculator with direct keyboard input, pill controls, expanded functions, and interactive multi-series graphing.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Unit Converter
plugins.description:
Unit converter for length, mass, volume, temperature, area, and speed. Supports fuzzy natural queries like '25.4oz toml'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Currency
plugins.description:
Currency converter with live rates. Triggers on !cur / !currency / !convert and on bare natural queries like '100 usd to eur'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Translate
plugins.description:
No-key server-side translation command with provider switching, romanization, speech, and leading natural-language triggers.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Dictionary
plugins.description:
Shows definitions, pronunciation, synonyms, antonyms, and origin for explicit dictionary queries.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Places
plugins.description:
HERE-powered local place recognition with Compromise NLP intent parsing and OpenStreetMap/Nominatim geocoding assistance. Shows nearby businesses and POIs with address, today's hours, cuisine, phone, directions, and an interactive multi-pin map. Recognizes bare business names, category/location phrases, 'near me' queries, and landmark lookups while preserving conservative false-positive guards. Requires a free HERE API key.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Stocks
plugins.description:
No-key stock quotes with server-side Yahoo Finance data, Stooq fallback, and selectable chart ranges.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: TMDB
plugins.description:
Shows rich movie, TV, and actor panels with compact rating logos, combined Rotten Tomatoes scores, and an available-service launcher.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Search History
plugins.description:
Stores your past searches with timestamps in this browser and surfaces them as a dropdown on the search bar. Use !history to view a deletable local list, with a configurable maximum entry count per device.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Auto Bang
plugins.description:
Autocomplete !bang commands in the search bar as you type, using the same autocomplete dropdown panel as search history.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Speedtest
plugins.description:
Internet speed test with selectable servers, latency, and a circular gauge. Supports !speedtest, !speed, !speed-test, !networkspeed, !internetspeed, and natural phrases like 'run a speedtest' or 'how fast is internet'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Until
plugins.description:
Countdown answers for natural date queries like 'years until 3000', 'days since Christmas', 'hours until next Friday', or '!until 5pm'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Timer / Stopwatch
plugins.description:
Compact timer and stopwatch with smooth circular progress, editable durations, optional sound, and natural timer queries.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Time
plugins.description:
Google-style world clock for cities and countries. Supports natural phrases like "time in France" and trailing queries like "Tokyo time".

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Official Extension Time
plugins.description: Test copy of the official Time slot with natural and trailing time queries.

plugins.name: Tip Calculator
plugins.description:
Interactive tip calculator with real-time bill split, custom slider parameters, and animations.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Color Translator
plugins.description:
Translates colors between hex, RGB/RGBA, HSL/HSLA, HSB/HSV, CMYK, UIColor, NSColor, and 1000+ named colors.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Undecideds
plugins.description:
Decision tools for coin flips, dice rolls, number picks, and yes/no choices.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Metronome
plugins.description:
Metronome widget with tempo controls, tap tempo, beat signatures, and Web Audio ticks.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Snake Game
plugins.description:
A snake game plugin with mobile support and full screen mode.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Minesweeper
plugins.description:
Play classic Minesweeper directly in your search results. Features classic board sizes/difficulties, flags, a mobile flag toggle, interactive emoji states, and a timer.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Tic-Tac-Toe
plugins.description:
Tic-Tac-Toe game with AI difficulty settings, local multiplayer, score tracking, and win-line animation.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Periodic Table
plugins.description:
Interactive periodic table of elements with symbol/name search, element group filters, dynamic temperature state simulator, and element details modal.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: Sports
plugins.description:
Shows live sports scores, schedules, and standings. Activates on natural queries like team names, 'premier league standings', or 'lakers vs warriors'.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!

plugins.name: OIDC Settings Gate
plugins.description:
Protect degoog's admin and settings gate with secure OIDC login, PKCE, issuer discovery, JWKS verification, and explicit admin allow rules.

If you love [degoog-toolkit](https://github.com/SoPat712/degoog-toolkit), leave a star!
